title: apple-touch-icon.png in brand bundle
body: The apple-icon.png route currently falls back to favicon.svg since no dedicated apple-touch-icon file exists in the brand bundle. Create a proper apple-touch-icon.png asset and add it to src/brands/aguy/assets/
rationale: The manifest references a dedicated apple-touch-icon; the current SVG fallback may not render correctly as a PNG on iOS home screens
